name: Super Smash Bros. The Movie (Live action Movie)
description: There was a girl named Aiko who was a young adult. She still lives with her mother. When she was younger, she played video games and watched a lot of cartoons a lot. She watched: True and the rainbow Kingdom, Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat noir, Bubble Guppies, Shimmer and Shine, Strawberry Shortcake: Berry in the big city, etc. The video games she played: Super Mario Bros., Sonic the hedgehog, Pokémon, Kirby, Legend of Zelda, Donkey Kong games, Metroid, A hat in time, Mega man, Etc. She would always wanted to meet them all someday, but when she got older, she gave up on all of that. One day, she was in a crowded Train and saw short mysterious people and that led her to super Mario and everyone else she thought about when she was younger. Mario, Aiko and everyone else have to stop a man named Lance Armstrong, who searched up these ‘weird energy sources’ in this world and decided to come up with a plan to conquer not just the world, but the universe; He brought all the villians, Bowser from Super Mario Bros., Ganondorf from the Legend of Zelda, and King K. Rool from Donkey Kong, and they all work together to take over the universe.
creator: Jamarionw32752
